name: MENA SaaS — Signal-Based GTM
description: 4-step cold email sequence targeting SaaS founders, CxOs, and VP Sales in UAE, KSA, Qatar, Kuwait. Gulf business culture tone, insight-driven, low-friction CTA.
target_icp: SaaS founders, CxOs, VP Sales — Gulf region

schedule.note: Sun-Thu sending. Asia/Singapore is proxy for Gulf Time (UTC+4 close to UTC+8 but Instantly maps it correctly for Gulf hours).

sequence_steps.step_purpose: Show you understand their world — relevance

variants.subject: {{firstName}}, noticed something about {{companyName}}
variants.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

{{personalization}}.

Most SaaS companies scaling in the Gulf hit the same wall — the GTM playbook from the US doesn't translate here. The trust mechanics are completely different.

We built a signal-based system that detects buying intent before it surfaces in conversations. Worth a quick 15-minute chat to see if it fits what you're doing?

Mamoun

variants.subject: Re: {{firstName}}, noticed something about {{companyName}}
variants.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Quick thought — we analyzed GTM patterns across 200+ B2B companies in the Gulf last quarter.

The ones growing fastest aren't doing more outbound. They're detecting signals earlier and responding faster than competitors.

One company in your space cut their sales cycle from 90 days to 35 using this approach.

Happy to share the specifics if useful.

Mamoun

sequence_steps.step_purpose: Social proof from similar companies — validation

variants.subject: How [similar company] cut their sales cycle in half
variants.body:
{{firstName}},

[Company name] was spending $15K/month on SDRs and getting 3 meetings. Now they get 12 — with zero SDR headcount.

The shift: they stopped guessing who's ready and started detecting it.

Same market as {{companyName}}. Want me to show you the exact setup?

Mamoun

sequence_steps.step_purpose: Graceful close that keeps door open — respect

variants.subject: Should I close this out, {{firstName}}?
variants.body:
{{firstName}},

I've reached out a couple times about signal-based GTM for {{companyName}}.

Totally get it if timing's off. I'll close this thread — but if things change, I'm always around.

Best,
Mamoun

customization_notes.social_proof_step: Replace [Company name] and [similar company] with real case studies matching the ICP. If no exact match, use adjacent industry.
customization_notes.personalization_line: Must reference something specific — recent funding, job change, company news, product launch, LinkedIn post. Generic = ignored.
customization_notes.subject_lines: A/B test by creating a second variant in the variants array. Change ONE element per test.
customization_notes.timing: 3-day gaps work for Gulf. Can test 2-day for higher urgency ICPs.
